description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named ci that can be called from another workflow. The workflow runs a single job on an ubuntu-latest environment with a ubuntu:noble container. In this job, check out the repository, then from a drake_cmake_installed_apt directory, run a bash script to set up the environment optionally with a --package-url argument if provided as a linux_noble_package_deb input to the workflow call. Finally, run another bash script to build and test.
